title: campanula rotundifolia var. stenophylla
intro: Campanula rotundifolia var. stenophylla, also known as Scottish harebell, is a variety of the bellflower plant, native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Campanula rotundifolia var. stenophylla include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. The plant can be prepared as an infusion, tincture, or salve, and is also used in traditional folk medicine to treat various ailments.
